blended.narrative: Revelstoke Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,976 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
